301.title: Operation Repo
301.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

302.title: Judge Judy
302.description: A woman says her ex owes her for an engagement ring, his share of a cruise, and a loan. Then, a plaintiff sues a man for crashing her car, making unauthorised charges on her card and ruining her credit.

303.title: Judge Judy
303.description: Dueling restraining orders, a stolen car and accusations of slander come into play when a couple break up. Then, a defendant insists that his ex-fiancee's sister never lent him $5,000.

304.title: Motorbike Cops
304.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

305.title: Motorbike Cops
305.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

306.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
306.description: They say, `you can't teach an old dog new tricks', but nobody has said anything about being unable to teach a bounty-hunting Dog new tricks. Which is good because after an eight-season run on A&E, Duane `Dog' Chapman brings his people-tracking skills to a new network, along with wife Beth and their son, Leland. But this time the Chapmans aren't searching for fugitives on their home turf of Hawaii. Instead, they travel to a different city each week and work with the local bondsman offices and bounty hunters, using their years of experience in the business to assist the local agents. The Chapmans motivate and inspire the local bounty hunters while training them how to use high-tech tracking devices and showing them new techniques they can use in finding fugitives.

307.title: Close Calls On Camera
307.description: A woman is trapped in her loft conversion bedroom while a fire rages below her, and a young boy falls from a promenade while chasing after his dog, so rescuers must race against the incoming tide.

333.description: Lisa faces the ultimate betrayal when the detectives find her boyfriend and best friend together. Jared's other half, Tony, is proving elusive.
